Mission and Vision

Corporate Identity

Mission and Vision

OUR MISSION

The mission of Doğuş University is:

-

to educate individuals to recognise and understand the country and the world they live in, perceive and respect differences, have solution-oriented perspectives, develop innovative ideas, adopt critical minds of thinking, and foster
    intellectual identity

- to undertake the pioneering role in the development of science, technology, art and culture in our country, and to conduct studies for the benefit of society

OUR VISION

The vision of Doğuş University is to be a world renowned university that always aims for perfection in education, research, and contribution to society.
